side_effects.description: Injection site pain starting as mild sting, increasing steadily for 16 hours post-injection, resulting in bruising, swelling, and itchiness. Previously also had welts before switching injection sites.
Flu-like ache localized to hip/injection area; pain severe enough to disrupt sleep

protocol_notes: Injecting into love handles and upper glute to avoid welts. Has injected 5 times over 7 days. Already taking Zyrtec daily for allergies. KLOW dose of 4mg stated to contain approximately 2.5mg GHK-Cu. Peptide journey just started.
